subcodes.first_line: The light which the All-Merciful hath sent down and revealed in the form of a Tablet, ordaining it as glad-tidings from His presence unto those who dwell [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نور انزله الرحمن و بعثه علی هیئه اللوح و جعله بشاره من عنده الی من فی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer, @living waters; water of life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
